agent_raw: This benchmark is methodologically valid. The key design decision — generating augmentations on the fly inside training folds only, after the original-image-level split — prevents the contamination that aggressive oversampling can cause. Near-duplicate synthetic images exist only in the training fold by construction; they never appear in validation or test. Physical-unit clustering prevents original-image near-duplicates from crossing fold boundaries. The later-week raw test set provides temporal separation and clean evaluation conditions. The limited claim scope (this camera and process) is correctly stated. Oversampling rare positives for an imbalanced defect-detection task is an accepted practice when the augmentations are confined to training, which they are here.
